name: Eclipse of the Heart
description:
Whenever I close my eyes, I still see you....

~~

You’re on the verge of asking her, offering a promise sealed with a ring. The weight of it sits in your palm like fate itself. Nothing bad is going to happen... right?

Creator's Notes: What is wrong with me you ask? Nothing! I am just overflowing with angsty ideas now.

We have hit 105 followers mark, you all rock guys! I genuinely had not expected all this when I started out making bots. Don't select below text if you don't want spoiler

I have talked with blind bots but found none that had like suddenness of the character turning blind so I made this.
creator: knight21
